title: Support  - Poly Product Support screen color in light mode
scenario: Product Support screen top box color does not match main body color in Light mode on Poly Lens Menu
steps: Ensure the app is in Light Mode (not Dark Mode)
Tap the Poly Lens Menu (hamburger menu or menu icon)
Observe the top box color on the Product Support screen
expected: The top box color on the Product Support screen matches the main body color of the screen.
